data.title: Taiwan Semiconductor's Potential Intel Takeover Could Widen Gap, Threatening Samsung's Chip Business: Report
data.description: Taiwan Semi's rumored acquisition of Intel could hinder Samsung's chip-making profit. Trump's takeover proposal for Intel's foundry biz adds to uncertainty.

data.title: Muddy Waters' Carson Block Warns Against Chinese Stocks Despite Recent Market Surge: Report
data.description: American investor Carson Block snubs China's stock market rally, citing accounting unreliability and geopolitical risks. Alibaba gained 51% in 6 months.

data.title: Louisiana-Pacific Q4: Earnings Beat, Dividend Hike, Solid Outlook And More
data.description: LPX beat Q4 2024 sales expectations, with siding revenue up 9% and OSB sales down 2%. Adjusted EPS increased to $1.03. Q1 outlook: $390M-$400M in siding sales and $130M-$150M in EBITDA. 2025 outlook: $1.65B-$1.7B in siding sales and $615M-$635M in EBITDA.

data.title: Stanley Druckenmiller Bet Big On United Airlines As Company Rebounded In Q4
data.description: Hedge fund manager Stanley Druckenmiller disclosed new position in United Airlines amid turnaround. Could signal confidence in long-term growth potential.

data.title: What the Options Market Tells Us About BigBear.ai Hldgs
